one_time_description: Correction of an error - prior year deferred revenue from Indigenous Services Canada not recorded, resulting in decrease to opening accumulated surplus of $220,785
economic_notes: First Nation operates sawmill, wood products, campsites, aggregate, CMHC housing units, community energy projects, forestry/biomass activities, and greenhouse project. COVID-19 impacted operations causing temporary office closures and delays in capital projects.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Consolidated statements include 5 subsidiaries (Papasay Management Corporation, Papasay Value Added Wood Products Ltd., Papasay Value Added Wood Products LP, Wawasum Group Limited, 2626189 Ontario Ltd.) and 1 GBE on modified equity basis (Papasay Management Limited Partnership). Correction of error reduced opening accumulated surplus by $220,785 related to unrecorded ISC deferred revenue in prior year. First Nation also disclosed non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline. Planning and Development segment has large deferred revenue movements. Total government transfers include federal and provincial transfers per Note 17.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
